chr8:g.128746677_128749160dupinv.note: Harvested from the SVD-WG004 consultation proposal, which is banner-flagged `not updated` and superseded by DNA/complex.md. The adopted recommendation rejects `dupinv` (`<code class="invalid">` at DNA/inversion.md:19, RNA/inversion.md:19) and re-expresses this exact orientation-reversed duplication as an inverted insertion (`NC_000008.11:g.(131500001_136400000)ins(127300001_131500000)_(131500001_136400000)inv`, DNA/complex.md). The seeded `spec_expected` was a fixture bug; force spec-rejects so ferro correctly rejecting `dupinv` reads as `correctly-rejected`, not `parse-error`. ferro supports the spec-correct `ins(...)_(...)inv` form instead (#546).
